metadata.description: DaybreakMD internal Claude Code plugins — Salesforce reporting, partner dashboards, prospecting workflows.

plugins.name: account-dashboard
plugins.description: DaybreakMD executive dashboard (single self-contained HTML file) for any Billing partner account in Salesforce. KPIs, SLA averages, trend chart, and per-patient tables, all client-side filterable by scope and time window.

plugins.name: account-dashboard-ops
plugins.description: DaybreakMD operations dashboard (single self-contained HTML file) for any Billing partner account in Salesforce. Tab-based work-list: unactivated patients, OOP-call backlog, pre-auth pending, in-manufacturing, dental-letter-required, impression-kit status, bad impressions. Sibling to account-dashboard (executive view).

plugins.name: internal-dashboard
plugins.description: DaybreakMD internal morning dashboard (single self-contained HTML file) for the Daybreak team. Tabbed layout: Morning Briefing, Action Queue, Recent Activity, Accounts, All Patients. Period comparisons (Today / Yesterday / 7d / MTD) and client-side filters. Internal use only — shows full patient names with Salesforce links.

plugins.name: partner-report
plugins.description: DaybreakMD weekly/monthly partner reports — one styled HTML report per Location account with Executive rollup + Operations stuck-patient sections. Saved locally for review before manual send. PHI-safe identifiers.

plugins.name: pre-d-prospecting
plugins.description: [WIP — Dan only] Automated physician prospecting pipeline. Pulls today's sleep test results from Salesforce, parses each PDF for the referring/interpreting physician + AHI severity, enriches via Apollo.io, and drafts personalized outreach emails. NOT YET PORTABLE — contains hardcoded paths to Dan's machine; do not install.
